data.title: Update project docs to reflect plugin boundary enforcement
data.description:
Scope: Update living reference documentation and navigation files to reflect the plugin boundary enforcement added by this epic. Run after all prior stories (S1-S4) are complete.

Updates required:
1. docs/reference/system-landscape.md: Add/update a section describing the plugin boundary — what is shipped in the plugin vs. what is project-local. Use atomic Tier 3 overwrite (state the new reality, do not append "changed from X to Y").
2. llms.txt: Add entries for docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ if not already present.

Done Definitions:
- [ ] docs/reference/system-landscape.md contains a section describing the plugin boundary (plugins/dso/ = distributed artifact; docs/designs/ etc. = project-local dev-team artifacts)
- [ ] llms.txt includes references to docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/ directories
- [ ] No Tier 3 living document contains references to plugins/dso/docs/designs/, plugins/dso/docs/findings/, or plugins/dso/docs/archive/
- [ ] system-landscape.md last_synced_commit frontmatter is updated to current HEAD commit hash
- [ ] Documentation describes the NEW state (plugin boundary enforced) not the OLD state

Considerations:
- [Maintainability] Tier 3 living docs use atomic/destructive overwrites — state the current reality, never append "updated to use X instead of Y"
- [Maintainability] Verify the docs section does not conflict with anything written by the doc-writer agent (S4) — the doc-writer may auto-update system-landscape.md based on the epic completion

Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked — proceed unless a significant assumption could send implementation in the wrong direction; document all assumptions made without escalating.
